codeReview.summary: Implementation fully satisfies VAL-WIRING-MANIFEST-003. The wiring_manifest method correctly returns Vec<Box<dyn WiringReport>> with 13 subsystem entries (11 wired + 2 Tier-2 stubs). All name(), identity(), and state() methods are populated. Tier-2 stubs (CostGuard, PreToolHookManager) return WiringState::Disabled with appropriate Tier messages.

issues.description: Unused import: WiringState is imported but not used in test_wiring_manifest_returns_all_subsystems
Unused import: WiringReport is imported but not used in test_wiring_manifest_each_entry_has_populated_fields
Unused import: WiringReport is imported but not used in test_wiring_manifest_returns_correct_count
Comment mismatch: Comment says '12 wired + 2 Tier-2 stubs = 14' but code actually adds 13 entries (11 wired + 2 stubs). The actual count is correct, only the comment is slightly misleading.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker used a wrapper-pattern approach for Arc-wrapped subsystem fields (TaskStateMachineReport, AgentPoolReport, etc.) to enable wiring_manifest() to return Box<dyn WiringReport>. This pattern was not previously documented in architecture.md but is a reasonable approach that doesn't conflict with existing conventions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: crates/swell-orchestrator/src/wiring.rs:249-536 defines wrapper structs for each Arc-wrapped subsystem

summary: Feature implementation is correct and complete. The wiring_manifest method returns Vec<Box<dyn WiringReport>> with 13 subsystem entries covering all Orchestrator fields including Tier-2 stubs. All validation contract assertions for VAL-WIRING-MANIFEST-003 are satisfied. Four unit tests added and passing. Minor unused import warnings in tests are non-blocking.
